frankentorch-wcoo softmax_parallel_golden
fast_rows=8192
fast_cols=2
f64_softmax_fast_bits:
0: 0x3fe0000000000000
1: 0x3fe0000000000000
16383: 0x3fe0000000000000
f64_log_softmax_fast_bits:
0: 0x0000000000000000
8191: 0x0000000000000000

0: 0x3f000000
1: 0x3f000000
16383: 0x3f000000

0: 0x00000000
